---
title: "Protocol"
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

The full study protocol will be made available here once approved and
registered.

**Protocol version:** v0.1 (draft, October 2025)

**Registry:** To be registered on ClinicalTrials.gov prior to enrolment.

**Ethics review:** Ethics applications will be submitted to:

- Ifakara Health Institute (IHI) Institutional Review Board, Tanzania
- Chief Statistician's Office (Ofisi ya Mtakwimu Mkuu), Zanzibar
  Ministry of Health
- Zanzibar Health Research Institute (ZAHRI), Tanzania
- Cantonal Ethics Review Board of Vaud, Switzerland
